body:
## Rationale

\`/drummers/<slug>/gear-history\` pages for Lars Ulrich, Joey Jordison, and Dave Lombardo are sitemapped at **priority 0.9** (same tier as the /battles and /vs hubs). They contain decade-spanning gear timeline data unique to MetalForge — ideal for AI citation on queries like "what drum kit did Lars use in the 90s?" and "Joey Jordison gear evolution".

Only a **top-level** \`/llms/gear-history.md\` exists. Zero per-drummer LLM files → zero AI citation surface for these 3 high-priority pages.

## Confirmed gap

\`\`\`bash
# Sitemap: 3 gear-history pages at priority 0.9
grep "gear-history" api/sitemap.js
# /drummers/lars-ulrich/gear-history   (priority: 0.9)
# /drummers/joey-jordison/gear-history (priority: 0.9)
# /drummers/dave-lombardo/gear-history (priority: 0.9)

# LLM surface: only top-level hub
ls public/llms/gear-history*
# public/llms/gear-history.md   (hub only)
# NO per-drummer files
\`\`\`

## Files to create (3)

- \`public/llms/gear-history/lars-ulrich.md\`
- \`public/llms/gear-history/joey-jordison.md\`
- \`public/llms/gear-history/dave-lombardo.md\`

## Template

\`\`\`markdown
# [Drummer Name] Drum Kit Gear History — [Band]

**Drummer:** [Name]  
**Band:** [Band]  
**Active:** [years]  
**URL:** https://metalforge.io/drummers/[slug]/gear-history

## Gear Timeline

### [Era / Album] ([Year])
- **Drums:** [kit model]
- **Cymbals:** [brands/series]
- **Notable:** [what changed, why]

### [Next Era] ([Year])
...

## Key Gear Changes
- [Bullet: most notable transitions]

## FAQ
**Q: What drum kit did [drummer] use in [decade]?**  
A: [Answer with era-specific kit details]

**Q: When did [drummer] switch from [brand A] to [brand B]?**  
A: [Year + context]

## Related
- [Drummer profile](https://metalforge.io/drummer/[slug])
- [Gear history page](https://metalforge.io/drummers/[slug]/gear-history)
\`\`\`

## Sitemap update

**File:** \`api/sitemap.js\`

Add near the \`/llms/gear-history.md\` entry (line ~520):

\`\`\`js
// Issue #NNNN: per-drummer gear history LLM markdown
...gearPriceHistoryDrummers.map(slug => ({ loc: \`/llms/gear-history/\${slug}.md\`, priority: '0.5', changefreq: 'monthly' })),
\`\`\`

\`gearPriceHistoryDrummers\` is already defined in sitemap.js: \`['lars-ulrich', 'joey-jordison', 'dave-lombardo']\`.

## Estimated organic uplift

Targets chronological gear queries: "what cymbals did Lars Ulrich use on Black Album", "Joey Jordison kit 2004", "Dave Lombardo Slayer era setup". These are AI chat queries where MetalForge has unique structured data no other site holds.

## Verify

1. \`ls public/llms/gear-history/\` shows 3 files
2. Each file ≥ 300 words with timeline structure
3. Sitemap generates \`/llms/gear-history/lars-ulrich.md\` etc.
4. GET each URL returns 200
5. \`grep -c "FAQ" public/llms/gear-history/lars-ulrich.md\` ≥ 1

## Done

When 3 \`/llms/gear-history/<slug>.md\` files exist with timeline + FAQ content, and sitemap includes their URLs.
title: SEO batch: /llms/gear-history/<slug>.md — 3 per-drummer gear history LLM files (Lars/Joey/Lombardo, sitemap priority 0.9)
